creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thank you for the approval.  Will commit with small changes:

 - will remove GH_PROJECT
 - will fix your do-install target to have staging support
 - will hook man/tippecanoe.1 into the build
 - will fix COMMENT in accordance with portlint
 - will reflow pkg-descr to less columns
 - will regenerate your patch files with make makepatch as per policy
